---
title: "Class19 Mini Project"
author: "Sahar Kamali"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(Biostrings)
```




```{r}
getwd()
```


```{r}
list.files()
```


```{r}
seqs <- readAAStringSet("A19156624_mutant_seq (1).fa")
```


```{r}
wt <- seqs[[1]]
mut <- seqs[[2]]
```


```{r}
wt_letters <- strsplit(as.character(wt), "")[[1]]
mut_letters <- strsplit(as.character(mut), "")[[1]]
```


```{r}
pos <- which(wt_letters != mut_letters)
pos
```


```{r}
wt_letters[pos]
mut_letters[pos]
```
